name: Thai Pineapple Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into bite-sized pieces.
2. Remove the stem from the pineapple and cut it in half. Hollow out the top and bottom portions, setting them aside. Dice the remaining pineapple meat. Reserve 1/4 cup of diced pineapple for later use; save the rest for another dish or dessert.
3. Heat 2 teaspoons of oil in a wok over medium heat. Add the cooked rice and stir-fry for about 1-2 minutes until heated through.
4. Add the shrimp, chicken pieces, and ham to the wok. Stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes until all ingredients are hot and well combined.
5. Add the peas and sliced green onions (use both the white and green parts) to the wok. Continue stir-frying for another minute or two until everything is evenly heated and blended.
6. Pour in 1 tablespoon of rice wine and mix well.
7. Place the pineapple cut side down over the range burner to heat through.
8. Serve the rice mixture on top of the pineapple.
